headline: Jefferies Upgrades Ulta Beauty (ULTA) on Strong Demand and Margin Outlook
summary: Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ:ULTA) ranks among the stocks to invest in before they split next. On April 20, Jefferies raised Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ:ULTA) to Buy from Hold and increased its price objective to $700 from $635. The firm stated that revenue resilience has grown as the beauty industry has expanded and makeup participation has […]
